items.claim: Tabitha Richi has abandoned her effective grappling-based style to pursue striking, which she is not proficient at.
items.quote: She does not have good enough striking to primarily strike and she just seemed to abandon the wrestling.

items.claim: Fatima Klene is a pressure grappler who effectively combines striking with takedown entries.
items.quote: She's a pressure grappler, very dangerous on the ground. She's got loose striking. She bounces on her toes, plots forward. When the distance is closed, she fires a right hand, and then shoots a takedown.

items.claim: Fatima Klene possesses superior striking, length, and grappling ability compared to Tabitha Richi.
items.quote: Fatima Mle is more dangerous everywhere. She's tall, she's long, she's lean, she's definitely going to be the better striker.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi's wrestling is currently ineffective because she focuses on cage control rather than finishing takedowns.
items.quote: She's holding you against the cage, racking up control time, but not getting you to the ground.

items.claim: Fatima Klene's only career loss occurred because she was controlled on the ground by a high-level wrestler.
items.quote: The only loss that Fatima Mle has was to Jasmine Jazicious who took her down and held her there.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi is not as skilled a wrestler as Jasmine Jazicious.
items.quote: Even at her best, Tabitha Richi was not as good a wrestler as Jasmine Jaz.
